name: Pachomius the Great
troparia: (Tone 8) Your abundant tears made the wilderness bloom,* and your sufferings made your labours fruitful a hundredfold;* you became a shining torch over the world.* O venerable father Pachomius,* pray to Christ our God that He may save our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 2) You became a light for the ends of the earth.* You peopled the desert with monks like a city.* You weakened your body by your abstinence.* You took up your cross and crucified yourself.* Pray unceasingly for all of us.
